sensitivity.note: Defense/ME employers: keep real names. Generic corporate: use sanitized versions. Always ask user.

jd.title: Senior Program Manager — Defense Systems

requirements.text: Experience managing multi-stakeholder defense acquisition programs
Track record of managing programs worth $50M+
Experience with fighter aircraft or weapons systems programs
Experience coordinating between international OEMs and national air forces
Engineering change management and configuration control
MS in Engineering or related field
Budget management, schedule risk analysis, and milestone tracking
Experience with export programs and international customers

responsibilities: Lead defense program management for fighter aircraft sustainment and upgrade programs
Manage cross-functional teams across engineering, logistics, and operations
Coordinate with international defense customers and OEM partners
Oversee engineering change proposals, configuration management, and technical baselines
Track program milestones, budgets, and risk registers
Present program status to senior leadership and customer representatives

expected_output.summary: Defense Program Management leader with 16+ years in Pakistan Air Force spanning JF-17 Thunder and SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C programs. Progressed from Assistant Director to Deputy Director PMO, managing cross-stakeholder coordination between CADI (China), SAAB (Sweden), PAC Kamra manufacturing, and operational squadrons. PMI-ACP certified with hands-on engineering background in avionics integration and weapons systems qualification.

experience.title: Deputy Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Led senior program management for JF-17 Thunder production lots, modification programs, and export coordination
Managed engineering change proposals, resource allocation, and technical baselines across multiple work packages
Coordinated flight test campaigns, weapons integration trials, and certification activities
Oversaw export variant coordination for international customers including Myanmar and Nigeria

experience.title: Assistant Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Coordinated program activities between CADI (OEM designer), PAC Kamra (manufacturing), and field squadrons
Tracked milestones across avionics integration, weapons systems qualification, and airframe production
Managed configuration control for indigenous systems including mission computer and AESA radar integration
Oversaw budget tracking, contractor deliverables, and schedule risk management

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed program activities for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment (9 aircraft)
Coordinated with SAAB (Sweden) for maintenance contracts, spare parts logistics, and obsolescence management
Tracked fleet availability metrics and mission readiness reporting

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led avionics and weapons systems integration for JF-17 Thunder Block III at CADI, Chengdu
Bridged cross-cultural engineering collaboration between Pakistani and Chinese technical teams
Supported flight test campaigns for weapons integration and avionics qualification

certifications: Google Project Management Professional Certificate (6 courses)
Engineering Project Management Specialization — Rice University (38 PDUs)
education: BE Avionics Engineering — College of Aeronautical Engineering, PAF (2004-2008)
